plain_language_summary: Municipalities have exclusive responsibility for cleanliness and upkeep of the commune.
Municipal waste collection is an assigned internal function.
Municipalities may carry out environmental protection functions directly or jointly with state bodies.
Municipal works units must apply environmental protection standards.
Municipalities have exclusive authority to apply public transport and traffic rules within the commune.
Municipalities may grant subsidies to non-profit entities up to 7% of the municipal budget.
Municipalities may contract private entities via public bidding to execute actions or manage assets.
Municipal actions must comply with national and regional plans.
Municipalities are responsible for urban planning and the communal regulatory plan.
